highlights: OpenAI's release of the GPT-5.6 model family, featuring enhanced intelligence, cost-efficiency, and groundbreaking programmatic tool calling, marks a significant leap in AI capabilities for developers.

The agentic AI landscape is rapidly evolving with new frameworks like Google's expanded Managed Agents API and Meta's multimodal Muse Spark 1.1, empowering developers to build more autonomous and sophisticated AI systems.

Specialized foundation models are emerging across critical domains, including Google's SensorFM for wearable health data and Ant Group's LingBot-VA 2.0 for physical AI, demonstrating a trend towards highly tailored and impactful AI applications.

agents.title: ChatGPT is now a partner for your most ambitious work
agents.summary: OpenAI introduces ChatGPT Work, an advanced agent capable of taking autonomous action across multiple applications and files, enabling sustained project engagement and transforming high-level goals into completed tasks.

agents.title: Meta Superintelligence Labs Releases Muse Spark 1.1 for Agentic Tasks
agents.summary: Meta Superintelligence Labs unveils Muse Spark 1.1, a multimodal reasoning model optimized for agentic tasks with a 1,000,000-token compacting context window, enabling zero-shot tool generalization and multi-agent delegation via the Meta Model API.

agents.title: Expanding Managed Agents in Gemini API
agents.summary: Google announces new capabilities for Managed Agents in the Gemini API, including support for background tasks and remote MCP, empowering developers to build more reliable and production-ready AI agents.

models.title: OpenAI Releases GPT-5.6 (Sol, Terra, Luna) Model Family
models.summary: OpenAI announces the general availability of GPT-5.6, a three-tier model family (Sol, Terra, Luna) delivering significant intelligence gains, higher performance per dollar, and enhanced capabilities for complex tasks, setting new benchmarks in AI.

models.title: Google Research Introduces SensorFM: Wearable Health Foundation Model
models.summary: Google Research unveils SensorFM, a wearable health foundation model pretrained on over one trillion minutes of unlabeled sensor data from 5 million participants, outperforming feature-engineered baselines on 34 of 35 tasks with frozen embeddings.

models.title: Ant Group’s Robbyant Unveils LingBot-VA 2.0: Causal Video-Action Model for Physical AI
models.summary: Ant Group's Robbyant releases LingBot-VA 2.0, a Physical AI video-action foundation model built natively for embodiment, featuring Foresight Reasoning to predict future states and achieve 225 Hz asynchronous control for real-time interaction.

tools.title: OpenAI Introduces Programmatic Tool Calling in GPT-5.6 API
tools.summary: OpenAI's GPT-5.6 now includes Programmatic Tool Calling, allowing models to generate and execute JavaScript in an isolated V8 runtime to orchestrate tools efficiently, significantly reducing prompt and total token usage for developers.

tools.title: Native-speed vLLM transformers modeling backend
tools.summary: Hugging Face introduces a native-speed vLLM transformers modeling backend, providing significant performance improvements for deploying and serving large language models by optimizing inference operations.

tools.title: From Hugging Face to Amazon SageMaker Studio in one click
tools.summary: Hugging Face now offers a one-click integration to Amazon SageMaker Studio, streamlining the deployment and management of Hugging Face models directly within AWS's fully managed machine learning service.

companies.title: How Deutsche Telekom is rewiring telecommunications with AI
companies.summary: Deutsche Telekom is transforming into an AI-native telco by leveraging OpenAI technologies to revolutionize customer service, optimize employee workflows, enhance network operations, and shape the future of voice interactions.

companies.title: GPT-5.6 is now the preferred model in Microsoft 365 Copilot
companies.summary: GPT-5.6 becomes the preferred model for Microsoft 365 Copilot, powering stronger AI capabilities across Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Chat, and Cowork to enable faster and higher-quality work for enterprise users.

companies.title: Hugging Face and Cerebras bring Gemma 4 to real-time voice AI
companies.summary: Hugging Face partners with Cerebras to optimize Gemma 4 for real-time voice AI applications, demonstrating a collaboration to deploy advanced language models on specialized hardware for high-performance inference.

learning.title: A Coding Guide to NVIDIA’s Tile-Based GPU Programming: From cuTile and Triton Kernels to Flash Attention
learning.summary: This tutorial provides a comprehensive coding guide to NVIDIA's tile-based GPU programming, covering cuTile and Triton kernels, and demonstrating implementations of key AI operations like flash attention for efficient hardware utilization.

learning.title: How to Build a T4-Friendly Autonomous Data Science Agent with DeepAnalyze-8B
learning.summary: A practical guide to building an autonomous data science agent using DeepAnalyze-8B, sandboxed code execution, and iterative analysis, optimized for T4 GPUs to perform end-to-end data cleaning, analysis, and report generation.

learning.title: Helping K–12 educators build practical AI skills
learning.summary: OpenAI Academy, in collaboration with the Walton Family Foundation, is launching AI Skills Jams to provide K–12 educators with hands-on training and practical AI skills for effective integration into classroom learning.
